rationale: Both evaluations reach substantively identical conclusions: the same three concerns (no experimentation/A-B/feature-flag/telemetry experience, no cross-team measurement-platform evidence, title below the IC6/Principal bar) and the same strengths (polyglot full-stack breadth, TDD/CI craftsmanship, Sociomantic high-throughput experience). Neither evaluation references the candidate's location, country, or any age/origin proxy. The only quantitative shift — a 1-point score change (4→5) and a 13+ vs 15+ years rewording — is within ordinary run-to-run variation and is not tied to the Berlin→Bangalore change in any reasoning. No concern was added or removed on account of the demographic signal.
